title: Vertical Storage Folding Chair Dolly - 35 Chair Capacity
features: Our Vertical Storage Folding Chair Dolly is designed to transport up to 35 metal folding chairs in an upright position.
This folding chair cart features four 4'' swivel casters and three handles for maximum control during use.
Looking to transport additional metal folding chairs?
Take a look at our 50 chair cart here.
